description_long: This is a round, rustic bread roll with a thick, uneven crust and a generous drizzle of white icing or glaze on its upper surface. The bread has a swirled, layered appearance, suggesting it may be a sweet pastry such as a cinnamon roll or Danish. The crust is golden-brown with deeper creases and folds, giving it a hand-formed, artisanal look. The icing appears to have melted and pooled in some of the bread's natural valleys, adding a glossy contrast to the matte, textured crust. There are no visible seeds, flour dusting, or branding on the surface. The bread looks dense yet soft, with a slightly irregular, homemade shape.
description: A rustic, round bread roll with a golden-brown, swirled crust and white icing drizzled on top, giving it a homemade, artisanal appearance.
description_view_0: The bread's top is visible with thick icing pooling in the center and deep folds in the crust.
description_view_1: This side view highlights the bread's layered, swirled structure and the way the icing drips down the side.
description_view_2: The bread appears more flattened from this angle, with less icing visible and more emphasis on the crust's folds.
description_view_3: The back view shows the bread's thick, uneven crust and minimal icing, emphasizing its rustic texture.
attribute_crust_pattern: The crust is thick, uneven, and deeply folded, with a rustic, hand-formed appearance. There is no visible scoring, flour dusting, or seeds, but a glossy white icing is drizzled irregularly over the top.
